THE COURT REQUIRES THAT THE MOVING PARTY IS TO PROVIDE THE COURT WITH A SET OF COURTESY COPIES OF THEIR PAPERS. WHEN SUBMITTING THE DUPLICATE COPIES, PLEASE PROVIDE A COVER LETTER TO THE COURT REFLECTING THE NEW HEARING DATE SO THAT THE COURTESY COPIES WON'T BE MISPLACED WHEN RECEIVED. JUDGE: PATRICK J. LAW AND MOTION 302, CROSS-DEFENDANTS GARRETT WAGONER AND LORI WAGONER'S DEMURRER TO CROSS-COMPLAINT. NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING: OVERRULED, TEN DAYS TO ANSWER. THE LISTING AGREEMENT IS SUSCEPTIBLE TO THE INTERPRETATION THAT THE BROKER WAS ENTITLED TO A COMMISSION UPON THE COMPLETION OF THE SALE. THAT OCCURED AND BASED ON THE PLEADINGS, THE CROSS-COMPLAINT COMES WITHIN THE HOLDING IN BABCOCK V HOUSTON (1973) 33 CAL APP 3D 858. JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR #8600

MINI MINUTES:
No appearance, tentative ruling is adopted. Defendant Earl Shagley's motion for a protective order is Granted. As drafted the subpoena is overbroad. The parties are ordered to meet and confer as to narrowing the scope of any subpoena. All requests for monetary sanctions are denied. Commissioner: Bruce Chan. Not reported.

Ntc And Motion For Protective Order
Off Calendar Jul-31-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance, tentative ruling is adopted. Defendant Carren Shagley's motion for a protective order is Granted. As drafted the subpoena is overbroad. The parties are ordered to meet and confer as to narrowing the scope of any subpoena. All requests for monetary sanctions are denied. Commissioner: Bruce Chan. Not reported.

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Strike Preliminary Statements Of Defts Carren Sue Shagley And Earl Shagley, And To Compel Further Answer
Off Calendar Jul-16-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance, tentative ruling is adopted. Plaintiff Garrett Wagoner and Lori Wagoner's motion to strike preliminary statements and to compel further responses to form and special interrogatories, request for production of documents, and requests for admissions is granted. The preliminary statements are stricken as they are not authorized by the Code of Civil Procedure. Defendant shall serve verified responses within 7 days of notice of this order. All requests for monetary sanctions are denied. Prevailing party to submit form of order. Commissioner: Bruce Chan. Not reported.

MINI MINUTES: CROSS-DEFENDANTS GARRETT WAGONER AND LORI WAGONER'S DEMURRER TO CROSS-COMPLAINT.
NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING: OVERRULED, TEN DAYS TO ANSWER. THE LISTING AGREEMENT IS SUSCEPTIBLE TO THE INTERPRETATION THAT THE BROKER WAS ENTITLED TO A COMMISSION UPON THE COMPLETION OF THE SALE. THAT OCCURED AND BASED ON THE PLEADINGS, THE CROSS-COMPLAINT COMES WITHIN THE HOLDING IN BABCOCK V HOUSTON (1973) 33 CAL APP 3D 858. (302/PJM/PB) JUDGE: PATRICK J.
